body_text:
20:13 â April 30, 2020
Update to Corporate Capture User Management Information
We provided enhanced procedures on setting up Corporate Capture users.
Clearing and Deposits Volume
Deposit Processing Part
Section 9.6, Corporate Capture User Management
We clarified where to find more information on user setup. Specifically:
If using CPS Admin to manage your users, refer to Corporate Capture User Role Combinations, Form 5936. Also refer to this document for information on setting up CPS Admin Security Officers with Corporate Capture access.
If using User Management to manage your users, refer to the User Management Part.
We also removed duplicate user management information from this section.
Access and Administration Volume
User Management Part
Section 9.6, Corporate Capture
We added significant details to this section to assist you in setting up Corporate Capture users via the User Management application. We better correlated the workflow options with the user role fields on User Management.
Document Library
Status
Corporate Capture, User Role Combinations
5936
We added clarity throughout the document on how to set up Corporate Capture users. We better correlated the workflow options with the user role fields on CPS Admin and User Management. We clarified where to find more information on user setup.
Revised
